name: Southwestern Vegetable Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven.
2. Add celery, bell pepper, carrots, and onion to the pan.
3. Saute until the vegetables are soft.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: salsa, salsa verde, taco sauce, zucchini, mushrooms, olives, garlic, and pepper.
5. Pour in the vegetable broth.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer on medium-high heat.
7. Reduce the liquid until it has thickened slightly.
8. Serve immediately.
